rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal exemptions. Educ. Code §39.0541 governs commissioner adoption of academic performance indicators and standards. These provisions address unrelated subjects with no textual intersection.
quote: Subject to Subsection (b), the commissioner may adopt indicators and standards under this subchapter at any time before issuing the evaluation of a school district or campus.
_note: No direct or indirect textual conflict identified. The homestead exemption amount does not reference or implicate the performance standards adoption framework in §39.0541.
